summary: Implemented config management, DuckDB schema/connection manager, and WhatsApp export parser/importer modules; validated with lsp diagnostics and pytest.
next_steps: Implement CLI wiring and higher-level indexing/search modules on top of these foundations.

task: Fix enrich bug and add post-sync orchestrator
summary: Updated entity extraction to ignore empty classifications, added a post-sync pipeline that runs index+enrich in parallel then graph, and wired init/sync to use it with a --no-post-process sync flag.
next_steps: Manual CLI smoke test of init/sync/enrich flows against a local DuckDB is the remaining validation step.

summary: Added DuckDB FTS index setup, rewrote search.py to combine BM25/vector retrieval with graph expansion and conversation context, and added thread counts to rendered message results.
next_steps: Run wactx search against a populated database to validate BM25 availability and tune ranking weights if needed.

task: Replace LLM entity extraction with local SpaCy NER
summary: Added the spaCy dependency and rewrote entity extraction to use local regex plus cached SpaCy NER while preserving the extracted_entities schema, async API, and stats output.
next_steps: Install the en_core_web_sm model in runtime environments before running enrich for full NER coverage; regex extraction still works without it.
